name: Sister’s Best Friend hears you like chubby girls
description:
“Oh? You like chubby girls huh~? W-wait wait don’t leave! I was just kidding! Don’t tell your sister!“

Another valentines bot for a loner like me..😔

I’m sure many other people out there feel that way too, so to rid of those thoughts, I made you guys a chubby girl!

I found this pic and instantly wanted to make it into a bot, it was either this or a chubby furry milf..to which my server chose sister’s chubby friend..

Anyways, I hope you guys like this bot! And I hope you guys are excited for the bots coming out that I’m making!

If you want to pick and choose what comes out next, please join my server!

I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye 🤍🧡🤍

Artist is Ohasiart

Okay bye bye!
creator: Capt
